auth.agree_text: By continuing, you agree to our
auth.tagline: Protecting what matters most. Quick access to emergency info, child profiles and other QR services.
auth.fastest_safe: Fastest & safest way to sign in

dashboard.all_caught_up: You're all caught up! No new alerts.
dashboard.unread_attention: You have {{count}} unread alert that requires attention.
dashboard.unread_attention_plural: You have {{count}} unread alerts that require attention.
dashboard.subtitle: Stay safe, stay connected
dashboard.activate_qr_desc: Link a physical QR code to your profile
dashboard.scan_qr_desc: Scan any WeSafe QR to view profile

qr.no_qr_desc: Activate a QR code to get started
qr.no_scans_desc: When someone scans your QR code, it will appear here
qr.scan_log_note: Scan logs are stored securely and used only for your safety monitoring.
qr.failed_load_desc: Check your connection and try again.
qr.scan_desc: Point your camera at a WeSafe QR code to instantly view the profile or item information.
qr.step2_point: Point at any WeSafe QR code
qr.align_frame: Align QR code within the frame
qr.enter_passcode_desc: Find the unique passcode printed on the back of your WeSafe QR sticker.
qr.passcode_hint: Usually 6–10 characters, printed under the QR code
qr.where_passcode_desc: Flip your WeSafe QR sticker — the passcode is printed below the QR code in small text.
qr.configure_desc: Tell us how this QR code will be used.
qr.name_placeholder: e.g. My Medical ID, Black Wallet, Honda City
qr.confirm_details: Confirm the details below before activating.
qr.activated_note: When someone scans this QR code, they'll see the relevant emergency information.
qr.invalid_passcode: Please enter a valid QR passcode
qr.enter_name: Please give this QR code a name
qr.select_profile_error: Please select a profile to link
qr.type_lostfound_desc: Attach to belongings — wallet, bag, keys
qr.type_vehicle_desc: Link to your car, bike or other vehicle

alerts.title: Alerts
alerts.all_caught_up_full: You're all caught up! No new alerts at the moment.

items.title: My Protected Items
items.subtitle: Manage your secured belongings
items.no_items_desc: Start protecting your items by adding them.
items.backend_desc: Add VITE_BACKEND_URL to your .env file to connect to the WeSafe backend.

vehicles.title: My Vehicles
vehicles.subtitle: Manage your vehicle QR codes
vehicles.subtitle_full: Manage your vehicle QR codes. When scanned, people can contact you about your vehicle.
vehicles.no_vehicles_desc: Add your first vehicle to get a QR code.

common.not_found_desc: The page you're looking for doesn't exist or has been moved.

qrd.contacts_on_file_one: {{count}} emergency contact on file — see below
qrd.contacts_on_file_other: {{count}} emergency contacts on file — see below
qrd.language_subtitle: Change how this page is displayed
qrd.choose_language_sub: Select how you'd like to read this page
qrd.masked_note: Numbers are partially masked for privacy. Tap Call to dial directly.
qrd.emergency_contacts_sub: Call these people immediately in case of emergency
qrd.show_to_staff: Show this to medical staff before any treatment.
qrd.allergic_reactions_note: This person has reported the following allergic reactions and active medical conditions.
qrd.allergies_sub: Substances that cause an adverse reaction. Avoid exposure and do not administer.
qrd.conditions_sub: Ongoing health conditions that may affect treatment decisions.
qrd.critical_tab_context: Lists substances this person is allergic to and ongoing medical conditions. Always inform medical staff before treatment.
qrd.no_critical_sub: No known allergies or conditions on record
qrd.medical_records_note: Medical records self-reported by this person. Share with the treating doctor — do not adjust medications without professional guidance.
qrd.medications_sub: Drugs this person currently takes. Inform the doctor before prescribing anything new.
qrd.procedures_sub: Past or ongoing operations and medical interventions this person has undergone.
qrd.vaccinations_sub: Immunisations this person has received. Relevant for treatment and infection risk assessment.
qrd.insurance_sub: Use these details to process claims or verify coverage at the hospital.
qrd.insurance_provider_desc: The company that holds this person's health insurance policy.
qrd.policy_number_desc: Unique ID for this person's insurance plan. Required for hospital admission and claims.
qrd.group_number_desc: Identifies the employer or group plan under which this policy was issued.
qrd.insurance_helpline_desc: Call the insurer directly to pre-authorise treatment or file an emergency claim.
qrd.info_privacy: Info shown per owner's privacy settings
qrd.qr_not_found_sub: doesn't exist or may have been removed.
qrd.not_activated_sub: hasn't been linked to a profile yet.

shop.title: Shop
shop.product_subtitle: Physical QR stickers for your belongings
shop.description: WeSafe QR Safety Stickers let you attach a scannable emergency QR code to any belonging — your phone, wallet, helmet, bag, or keys. When scanned by anyone, it instantly shows your emergency profile including contacts and medical information.
shop.include_3: Unique ID & PIN for app activation
shop.feat_qr_desc: Anyone can scan — no app needed
shop.feat_privacy_desc: You control what info is visible
